svg.title: AstralBeam symbol
svg.desc: A clearer lowercase a/b monogram using two bowls joined by a shared central beam.
svg.metadata: AstralBeam symbol construction: - Intent: clarify the lowercase a/b read while keeping the original thin geometric style. - Reusable id: #astralbeam-mark. - Keep logo colors aligned with the theme values in packages/ui/src/styles.css. - The center beam is shared by both letters. - The bowls tuck slightly into the beam so the mark reads more like connected a/b forms.
